full_text:
Xun Can (Fengqian) 荀粲 (奉倩)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Can (荀粲), styledFengqian (奉倩), was born in Yingchuan. Unambitious philosopher, known to many great men. Died a year after losing his beautiful wife. Xun Can was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xun Can lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
